title: pourthiaea laevis var. albescens
intro: Pourthiaea laevis var. albescens, also known as the White Smooth Tree, is a variant of the Pourthiaea laevis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Anisophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pourthiaea laevis var. albescens include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications and ointments.
